# TradeXRay AI

> AI-powered crypto trading intelligence platform: real-time signals, multi-layer probability scoring, and ATR-based risk management for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and altcoins.

TradeXRay AI is a web platform that helps traders make data-driven decisions on Binance, Bybit, OKX, and other exchanges. It combines AI-powered probability scoring, sentiment analysis, and 20+ technical indicators in one workspace.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the TradeXRay AI platform and signal engine.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Live signals, market overview, and portfolio insights.
- [Subscriptions](/subscriptions): Plans, pricing, and access tiers.
- [API Documentation](/api-docs): REST API reference for programmatic access to signals.

## Optional

- [Settings](/settings): User-facing account and preferences (auth required).
